title: EDPB identifies challenges hindering the full implementation of the right to erasure
summary: Brussels, 18 February - The European Data Protection Board (EDPB) has adopted a report on its Coordinated Enforcement Framework (CEF) action on the right to be forgotten (Art.17 GDPR).
